items.title: Why "The Odyssey" was shot entirely on IMAX film
items.desc: Correspondent Scott Pelley and director Christopher Nolan visited Fotokem, the last motion picture lab in the world that makes 70mm prints, to see finishing touches being made to "The Odyssey," the first feature shot entirely on IMAX film.

items.title: Christopher Nolan imagines every movie is the last he'll ever make
items.desc: Director Christopher Nolan imagines every movie is the last he'll ever make. He brought that mindset to "The Odyssey."

items.title: Christopher Nolan directs to make "most extreme version of a story possible"
items.desc: Christopher Nolan, director of "Oppenheimer," "Inception," "Interstellar," and "The Dark Knight," imagines every movie is the last he'll make, leading him toward an ambitious plan for "The Odyssey."

items.title: Analytics firm connects bets made on war with signs of insider trading
items.desc: More than $1 billion has been bet online on military decisions and outcomes this year on Polymarket. Some wagers have been suspiciously timed, with information seemingly coming from insiders.

items.title: Suspicious trades make millions with bets tied to U.S. military operations
items.desc: Prediction market users are profiting from bets on war. Analysts say suspiciously timed bets, and the high win rates of wagers on military outcomes , are likely signs of insider trading.
